# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

apiVersion: envoy.io/v3
kind: NetworkFilterConfig
name: api-gateway
type: filter
stats_prefix: ingress_http

filters:
  - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
    typed_config:
      "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3beta1.HttpConnectionManager
      codec_type: AUTO
      route_configuration:
        name: api-gateway-routes
        virtual_hosts:
          - name: api-gateway-host
            domains: ["*"]
            routes:
              - match:
                  prefix: "/api/v1/*"
                route:
                  cluster: backend-service-a
              - match:
                  prefix: "/api/v2/*"
                route:
                  cluster: backend-service-b
      http_filters:
        - name: envoy.filters.network.http_router
        - name: envoy.filters.http.router
      transport_socket:
        name: envoy.transport_sockets.tls
        typed_config:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.transport_sockets.tls.v3.UpstreamTlsContext
          common_tl_context:
            @type: type.googleapis.com/google.api.tls.common_tls_context
            tls_certificates:
              - certificate_chain: INLINE
                certificate_raw: LS0tCg==
              - private_key: INLINE
                private_key_raw: LS0tCg==
          verify_peer: true
      connection_pool:
        max_connections_per_route_stats_prefix: 500
        max_connections_per_route: 2000
      resource_names:
        cluster: backend-service-a
        cluster: backend-service-b

  - name: envoy.filters.network.health_checker
    typed_config:
      "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3beta1.HealthCheckFilterConfig
      stat_prefix: ingress_http_cluster_health
      cluster_names: ["backend-service-a", "backend-service-b"]
      interval: 500ms
